key_insight: You just achieved an extraordinary 2400% return to reach $25K — this is NOT the time to get reckless. The path from $25K → $50K is about disciplined execution, not gambling. You're sitting on a perfect entry position: zero drawdown, zero baggage, zero heat. When market opens, let the scanner do its job. Wait for 09:45-10:15 ET when volume stabilizes and patterns clarify. Your edge is patience + precision. Every trade from here compounds at 2.5% risk per position ($625 max) — 40 perfect trades doubles the account. You don't need home runs. You need singles and doubles with ironclad risk management. The family is counting on boring consistency, not heroic volatility. Stay cold. Stay calculated. Capital preservation is everything.
